items.definition_en: Heat means a high temperature.
items.example_en: The heat in July can be very strong.

items.definition_en: Cold means a low temperature.
items.example_en: I feel the cold when winter comes.

items.definition_en: Warmth means a comfortable feeling of heat.
items.example_en: I love the warmth of the sun.

items.definition_en: A chill means a slight coldness in the air.
items.example_en: There is a chill in the morning.

items.definition_en: Temperature is how hot or cold something is.
items.example_en: The temperature dropped last night.

items.definition_en: A heatwave is a long period of very hot weather.
items.example_en: A heatwave lasted all week.

items.definition_en: A cold snap is a short period of very cold weather.
items.example_en: There was a cold snap in January.

items.definition_en: Coolness means a pleasant lack of heat.
items.example_en: The coolness of the evening felt nice.

items.definition_en: Humidity means how much water is in the air.
items.example_en: The humidity makes it feel warmer.

items.definition_en: Dryness means the lack of water or moisture.
items.example_en: I noticed the dryness in the air.

items.definition_en: Heat index shows how hot it feels with humidity.
items.example_en: The heat index was very high yesterday.

items.definition_en: A temperature drop is when it gets much colder.
items.example_en: There was a temperature drop at night.

items.definition_en: Scorching means very strong heat.
items.example_en: The scorching was hard to stand.

items.definition_en: A warm front is warm air moving in.
items.example_en: A warm front is coming tomorrow.

items.definition_en: A cold front is cold air moving in.
items.example_en: A cold front will reach the city tonight.

items.definition_en: A freeze is when the temperature goes below zero.
items.example_en: There is a freeze every winter.

items.definition_en: Minimum is the lowest temperature recorded.
items.example_en: The minimum was two degrees last night.

items.definition_en: Maximum is the highest temperature recorded.
items.example_en: The maximum reached thirty degrees today.

items.definition_en: Overheating means something gets too hot.
items.example_en: Overheating can be dangerous in summer.

items.definition_en: Subzero means below zero degrees.
items.example_en: It stayed subzero for days last winter.
